title: Senior Doctor - Max Healthcare - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Max Healthcare - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
We at Max Healthcare are looking for an experienced Senior Doctor based out of Kochi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Max Healthcare:
Max Healthcare is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Telemedicine

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Max Healthcare!
